examples: Fix rat traps on the gangplank.
The surface of the gangplank was bossed to prevent slipping.
She wept when he ran down the gangplank; sobbed as he stood on the dock, waving.
Metal detectors will be positioned at the end of the gangplank, while sniffer dogs and uniformed and plain clothes policemen will stand guard.
You enter through a revolving door, go down a long gangplank into the center of the sunken dining room--a chrome-and-tile diner that could have been imagined by Frank Lloyd Wright.
